calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Los Angeles Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Los Angeles Unified School District is Thursday, August 14, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Los Angeles Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Los Angeles Unified School District is Wednesday, June 10, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Los Angeles Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Los Angeles Unified School District runs Mar 30, 2026–Apr 3, 2026, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Los Angeles Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Los Angeles Unified School District runs Dec 22, 2025–Jan 9, 2026, 19 days. School resumes Jan 12, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Extended Winter Recess
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Recess runs Dec 22–Jan 9, totaling 19 days — among the longest winter breaks of any large California district.

yearNumbers.label: Farm Workers Day
yearNumbers.detail: LAUSD observes Cesar Chavez/Farm Workers Day as a school holiday on March 27 — the Friday before Spring Recess begins, creating an 8-day no-school stretch.

yearNumbers.label: Armenian Remembrance Day
yearNumbers.detail: April 24 is Armenian Genocide Remembrance Day, observed as a school holiday — a distinctive LAUSD-specific day not found in most other California districts.

calendarNotes: LAUSD traditional-calendar schools begin the 2025–2026 school year on August 14, 2025. Year-round campuses operate on separate rotating track schedules (Track A, B, and C) with different start, break, and end dates — always confirm which calendar your child's school follows before making plans. Traditional-calendar schools end June 10, 2026.
